results.validation_notes: Previous classification as 'Microservices,Event-Driven,Domain-Driven Design,Pipe-and-Filter' was incorrect. The connectors are library modules (Kafka Connect plugins), NOT independently deployable microservices - they run within the Kafka Connect runtime. DDD signals (score 0.3) were weak and not substantiated by code structure. Pipe-and-Filter (score 0.3) describes the data flow pattern but is not the primary architectural style. The repository is fundamentally a framework/library implementing Event-Driven CDC, not a microservices application.
